channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: VoltAgent /awesome-agent-skills | N/A | N/A
item.description: A curated collection of 1000+ agent skills from official dev teams and the community, compatible with Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and more.

item.title: sansan0 /TrendRadar | Python | N/A
item.description: ⭐AI-driven public opinion & trend monitor with multi-platform aggregation, RSS, and smart alerts.🎯 告别信息过载，你的 AI 舆情监控助手与热点筛选工具！聚合多平台热点 + RSS 订阅，支持关键词精准筛选。AI 智能筛选新闻 + AI 翻译 + AI 分析简报直推手机，也支持接入 MCP 架构，赋能 AI 自然语言对话分析、情感洞察与趋势预测等。支持 Docker ，数据本地/云端自持。集成微信/飞书/钉钉/Telegram/邮件/ntfy/bark/slack 等渠道智能推送。

item.title: dayanch96 /YTLite | Logos | N/A
item.description: A flexible enhancer for YouTube on iOS

item.title: microsoft /ai-agents-for-beginners | Jupyter Notebook | N/A
item.description: 12 Lessons to Get Started Building AI Agents

item.title: ruvnet /RuView | Rust | N/A
item.description: π RuView: WiFi DensePose turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time human pose estimation, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.

item.title: zilliztech /claude-context | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Code search MCP for Claude Code. Make entire codebase the context for any coding agent.

item.title: thunderbird /thunderbolt | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: AI You Control: Choose your models. Own your data. Eliminate vendor lock-in.

item.title: Fincept-Corporation /FinceptTerminal | Python | N/A
item.description: FinceptTerminal is a modern finance application offering advanced market analytics, investment research, and economic data tools, designed for interactive exploration and data-driven decision-making in a user-friendly environment.
